headline: Lennar Stock Drops After Earnings. Why the Builder Says Its Shares Are Undervalued
summary: Lennar  asset-light business model deserves a new, higher multiple, the company said in a new investor presentation Friday.  The home builder’s second-quarter revenue missed Wall Street’s expectations, according to financial results released Thursday.  Lennar’s results were “just fine,” but its guidance was disappointing, Oppenheimer analyst Tyler Batory wrote in a reaction to the report.
